title: 第一次买成片？别被参数绕晕，这样选才不踩坑

clips.scene: A person looking overwhelmed by a complex spreadsheet or technical diagram.
clips.action: The person sighs and rubs their temples, looking confused and frustrated.

clips.scene: A split screen showing a generic parameter list on one side and a real-world scenario (e.g., video editing interface) on the other.
clips.action: The camera pans across the parameter list, then zooms into the real-world application, highlighting the disconnect.

clips.scene: A clean desk surface with sticky notes being placed down, representing steps.
clips.action: Hands place three distinct sticky notes on the desk, each with a simple icon representing a step (e.g., a checklist, a gear, a bar graph).

clips.scene: Focus on a single sticky note with an icon representing a 'key metric' (like speed or compatibility).
clips.action: A finger points to the icon, then draws a line to a simple graph icon on another note, emphasizing the connection.

clips.scene: A montage of simplified, animated graphics comparing two abstract 'solutions' based on the identified metrics.
clips.action: The graphics animate to show one solution outperforming the other on a specific metric bar.

clips.scene: A friendly presenter (or animated character) giving a thumbs up next to a clean graphic representing the 'chosen' solution.
clips.action: The presenter smiles confidently and gestures towards the graphic, which shows positive checkmarks next to key metrics.

clips.scene: A hand pointing towards the camera, then gesturing to a 'like' button animation.
clips.action: The hand performs a 'like' gesture, followed by an animated 'like' button appearing on screen.
